System Overview

The GFS Digital Solution consists of two IT products: GFS (Guided Fault Search) and PDA (Porsche Diagnostic Agent). The system is deployed on AWS using Infrastructure-as-Code (AWS CDK) and follows a microservices architecture with serverless components.

Product: GFS

GFS provides guided fault search and diagnostic decision trees for Porsche workshop technicians. The architecture consists of:

ComponentRepositoryTechnologyPurpose
Frontend Hosting & AuthGFS/gff-cloud-frontendAWS CDK, CloudFront, Lambda@EdgeHosts frontend applications with PPN authentication
Workshop APIGFS/gff-cloud-workshopAWS CDK, API Gateway, Lambda, TypeScriptWorkshop-related API endpoints
Admin APIGFS/gff-cloud-adminAWS CDK, API Gateway, Lambda, DynamoDBAdministration interface and configuration management
SMAMO APIGFS/gff-cloud-smamoAWS CDK, API Gateway, LambdaDecision tree retrieval and filtering
XSLT ParserGFS/gff-cloud-xslt-parserAWS CDK, Lambda, TypeScriptXSLT document transformation
Technical ServiceGFS/gff-cloud-technicalAWS CDK, LambdaTechnical data processing
DatabaseGFS/gff-cloud-databaseAWS CDK, RDS/DynamoDBData persistence layer
DB MigrationGFS/gff-cloud-db-migrationAWS CDKDatabase schema migrations
Prisma MasterdataGFS/gff-cloud-prisma-masterdataAWS CDK, LambdaVehicle master data integration
CDK LibraryGFS/gff-cdk-libraryTypeScript, AWS CDKReusable CDK constructs (v1.155.0)
SDK LibraryGFS/gff-sdk-libraryTypeScript, AWS SDKReusable AWS SDK utilities (v1.230.0)
Commons (CI/CD)GFS/gff-commonsGitLab CI templatesShared pipeline configurations
CRS APIGFS/gff-crs/gff-crs-apiAWS CDKContent Retrieval Service API
CRS InfrastructureGFS/gff-crs/gff-crs-iacAWS CDKCRS deployment infrastructure
Cognito FederationDSWTEAMSYS/aws-cognito-ppn-federationAWS CognitoPPN (Porsche Partner Net) identity federation

Product: PDA (Porsche Diagnostic Agent)

PDA is an AI-powered automotive diagnostic system using AWS Bedrock AgentCore and LangGraph for multi-step reasoning.

ComponentRepositoryTechnologyPurpose
Core InfrastructureGFS/pda/pda-coreAWS CDK, Bedrock AgentCoreIaC for AgentCore runtime deployment (bootstrap + application layers)
AI AgentsGFS/pda/pda-agentsPython, LangGraph, AWS BedrockMulti-step diagnostic reasoning agents
FrontendGFS/pda/pda-uiAngular, AWS CDK, CloudFrontUser interface for diagnostic interactions

Infrastructure

All services are deployed on AWS (region: eu-west-1) using the following patterns:

  • Infrastructure-as-Code: AWS CDK (TypeScript) across all repositories
  • Compute: AWS Lambda (serverless), Bedrock AgentCore (PDA)
  • API Layer: AWS API Gateway
  • Authentication: AWS Cognito with PPN federation (Porsche Partner Net)
  • Storage: DynamoDB, RDS, S3
  • CDN: CloudFront with Lambda@Edge for authentication

Shared Libraries

Cross-cutting concerns are managed through shared npm packages published to the GitLab package registry:

  • @gff/cdk-library (v1.155.0) — Reusable AWS CDK constructs
  • @gff/sdk-library (v1.230.0) — Reusable AWS SDK utilities
  • GFS/gff-commons — Shared GitLab CI/CD pipeline templates

Auto-generated from GitLab repositories. Last updated: 2026-04-29. Do not edit sections marked as auto-generated.

Deployment Pipeline

All GFS and PDA components use GitLab CI/CD pipelines with shared templates from GFS/gff-commons. Deployments follow a progressive rollout through multiple environments.

Pipeline Stages

The standard deployment pipeline consists of the following stages:

StageDescription
vulnerability-scanSecurity vulnerability scanning of dependencies
buildTypeScript compilation, Lambda bundling
testUnit tests, coverage reporting
static-code-analysisSonarQube analysis
taggingVersion tagging (semantic versioning)
deploy-devDeployment to development environment
deploy-stageDeployment to staging environment
deploy-prodDeployment to production environment

Environments

EnvironmentPurposeTrigger
devDevelopment and integration testingAutomatic on main branch
stagePre-production validationAutomatic after dev success
prodProductionManual approval or automatic

Deployment Technology

  • IaC Tool: AWS CDK (TypeScript)
  • CI/CD: GitLab CI with shared templates from GFS/gff-commons (.gitlab-ci-aws.yml)
  • AWS Authentication: IAM Roles assumed per service (e.g., AWS_PDA_CORE_IAM_ROLE, AWS_CLOUD_FRONTEND_IAM_ROLE)
  • Region: eu-west-1 (primary)

Shared CI/CD Templates

All repositories include CI configuration from GFS/gff-commons:

  • .gitlab-ci-aws.yml — Standard AWS deployment pipeline
  • .gitlab-test.yml — Test execution templates
  • helpers/auth.yml — AWS authentication helpers
  • helpers/cdk-deploy.yml — CDK deployment helpers

Pipeline Rules

Most repositories exclude merge request event pipelines to avoid duplicate runs:

yaml

Per-Product Specifics

PDA

PDA components use additional pipeline features:

  • Python-based deployment (pda-agents uses pytest, pip)
  • AWS Bedrock AgentCore runtime deployment (pda-core)
  • Angular build pipeline (pda-ui)

Testing Strategy

The GFS Digital Solution employs a multi-layered testing approach covering unit tests, integration tests, end-to-end tests, and load tests.

Test Frameworks

LevelFrameworkRepositories
Unit TestsJest (TypeScript)pda-core, pda-ui, gff-cloud-*, gff-cdk-library, gff-sdk-library
Unit Testspytest (Python)pda-agents
E2E TestsCypressGFS/gff-e2e-cypress
Integration TestsCustom (TypeScript)GFS/pda/pda-integration-tests
API TestsCustomGFS/pda/pda-api-tests
Load TestsCustomGFS/gff-crs/crs-load-tests
Request TestsCustomGFS/gff-crs/crs-request-tests

CI Integration

Tests are executed as part of the GitLab CI pipeline in the test stage. All repositories include:

  • Unit test execution with coverage reporting
  • Static code analysis via SonarQube (stage: static-code-analysis)
  • Vulnerability scanning (stage: vulnerability-scan)

Unit Testing

21 out of 41 repositories have configured test frameworks. Jest is the primary unit test framework, configured via jest.config.js or jest.config.ts with coverage collection enabled.

Example configuration pattern (from gff-cloud services):

json

End-to-End Testing

E2E tests are maintained in GFS/gff-e2e-cypress covering workshop and QS publication flows. Tests run against deployed environments using Cypress.

PDA-Specific Testing

  • pda-agents: Python pytest for AI agent logic validation
  • pda-api-tests: Dedicated API contract testing
  • pda-integration-tests: Cross-service integration validation

Quality Gates

The pipeline enforces quality through:

  • Test coverage thresholds (enforced via Jest coverage config)
  • SonarQube quality gate (static-code-analysis stage)
  • npm audit at moderate or critical level
  • Linting (ESLint for TypeScript, Prettier for formatting)
